commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he spoke unto Korah and unto all his company, saying, Even tomorrow the LORD will show who are his, and who is holy; and will cause him to come near unto him: even him whom he has chosen will he cause to come near unto him. The holy ones, whom he has chosen for the high priesthood. The psalmist, speaking of this sedition, says, they provoked. Aaron, the holy one of the Lord, Psalm cv. (Calmet) See 1 Timothy ii. Only those who are chosen by God, can lawfully perform this sacred office, as the Almighty declares by a miracle.
